feed.title: AO3 - Dick Grayson/Jason Todd (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Dick Grayson/Jason Todd on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: Lungs Over Flowers
entry.summary:
Author: soaring_bubblegum

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,888Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 34

Summary: His throat felt raw, shredded, and there was a taste in his mouth, copper and something else, something floral and sickeningly sweet. When he finally managed to pull his hand away from his mouth, gasping for air that wouldn't quite fill his lungs, there was a single petal resting against his glove. It was red. Deep, arterial red, so dark it looked black in the shadows cast by Gotham's smog-choked sky. The edges were slightly curled, delicate as tissue paper, and there was a smear of blood across its surface—his blood, he realised with a strange, detached horror. DickJay Week 2026 - Day 7 - Hanahaki Disease

entry.title: Red chrysanthemums
entry.summary:
Author: Abraxax

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,562Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 16

Summary: DickJay Week 2026 (Day 7) Gods/Goddesses | Hanahaki Disease | Hypnosis/Brainwashing |"Jason, come with me..."He wonders how he'll die this time, if the flowers will rot and fester in his lungs, taking him out in a feverish, delirious sepsis, or if their roots will simply suck up all of the oxygen in his lungs, depriving him of any kind of respite, until they suffocate him; after all, Jason is the universe's living, walking punch bag. The first time, he suffocated on hot, violent smoke that burned his nostrils, his throat, and his lungs; now, he will suffocate on flowers that make gardens out of them. At least they are pretty.His throat was itchy, and something tickled the back of it, and no matter which position he assumed, it did not go away; his chest started to hurt with each breath, and soon enough, he started coughing. The fit itself was shorter than usual, but it still hurt like hell. There was a full bloom trying to get out. A pretty red chrysanthemum, tinted burgundy due to the little droplets of blood it took from him. Deep love, mixed with pain and sorrow.

entry.title: Thicker Than Water
entry.summary:
Author: sarriathmg

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,232Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 27

Summary: “You don’t understand,” Jason hisses, unsure if he’s more pissed or sullen. “None of you idiots have ever understood.” “You’re coming with me,” Nightwing says, already reaching for the escrima sticks behind him. “I will fix you. I’m taking you with me even if I have to carry you out.”Jason wakes up chained and collared on a simple twin bed inside a locked cell. Dick has made good on his word. Dickjay Week 2026 Day 7: "Jason, come with me…"

entry.title: Got Me On My Knees
entry.summary:
Author: Nobyl

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,913Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 35

Summary: Convincing Jason to let Dick try to hypnotize him had been easier than Dick had expected. He had had a whole presentation and speech ready listing out the pros of it and how Dick would make sure to keep him safe, but Jason immediately agreed, too quickly for someone who hadn’t already imagined the situation.   Written for DickJay week 2026 day 7: Hypnotism/Brainwashing

entry.title: Fever Pitch
entry.summary:
Author: Anonymous

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,578Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 43

Summary: "Ivy spores," he announces, showing off a tablet with the tox makeup of the sample. "Low dose, synthetic, probably being reproduced as an aphrodisiac street drug. Non-fatal." "B got anything for it?" Jason asks. "Not this variant. I can probably whip something up, but I'm pretty sure it'll all be worked out of his system before it's finished. It'll be a rough night for him, but he'll sweat it out for a few hours and be okay by morning." "What a relief," Alfred sighs. "Still, I shall feel better if someone watches over him for the night." "I'll do it," Jason says immediately. Then flushes as they all round on him with knowing looks. "Not because I'm worried or anything," he huffs, crossing his arms. He nods his head toward Tim and Damian. "It's a school night." The brats snicker. Even Alfred's lips turn up just the slightest bit. "As you say, Master Jason. I shall leave him in your care."-----DickJay Week 2026 Day 4 Amnesiac/Catatonic Jason | Identity Porn | Jason Todd has a Vagina | Rescue

entry.title: Lightning In A Bottle
entry.summary:
Author: elwon

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,000Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 50

Summary: “We’re going to play spin the bottle!” Dick announces, tripping into the room, waving said glass bottle in his hand. “It’s my birthday, you don’t get to say no.”Jason looks up from his magazine and looks around the room. “Are you sure about that, Dickie?”“Yes, one hundred percent sure. We’re playing!” Dick grins at him lazily, practically throwing himself down at Jason’s feet, so that he’s sitting on the floor staring up at Jason.

entry.title: He's Someone's Secret
entry.summary:
Author: cadkitten

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,348Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 49

Summary: Dick says what he always says, a smooth purr of, "This is our secret, Jason." And Jason responds how he always does, a sly little, "So I'm your dirty little secret then?" That sinful smile gracing Dick's lips. The tap of his fingertips beneath Jason's jaw and then the rasp of his zipper, obvious in this quiet pocket of Gotham's night.

entry.title: Mr. Knightley
entry.summary:
Author: Abraxax

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,046Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 37

Summary: DickJay Week 2026 (Day 6) Batman Dick/Knightfight | Fake/Accidental Marriage | Public Sex | "So I'm your dirty little secret?"He doesn't recognize the number, but the area code comes from the UK, so out of pure curiosity, he plugs the phone into a charger and goes to look for some cereal. It's not been 15 minutes when the burner rings again, he picks it up, and a calm male voice says, 'Hello, Mr. Knightley?' He does a quick run over the people who know that name and have that phone, but as far as he knows, there should be none. He says yes, either way, willing to see how far this goes. 'I'm Nurse Haynsworth, calling you from The Royal Victoria Infirmary, regarding your husband.' He moves back to his office and turns on his laptop, quickly searching the name and finding a hospital in Newcastle upon Tyne in the UK. 'There was an explosion, and your husband was caught in it. As his next of kin, we require your presence, Sir.' He does not have a husband.

entry.title: His Batman
entry.summary:
Author: sarriathmg

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,132Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 44

Summary: Before Wayne Manor, Jason used to have nightmares. He’d dream about old clients, both regulars and one-offs; all the degradation and abuse he’d suffered at their hands. Ever since he started living in the manor—since becoming Robin—Jason has rarely had those dreams. Still—occasionally—when times are bad, when old habits get the better of him, when the expectations of the job become suffocating, or tensions arise, or even just when regular spells of self-doubt invade his mind, the nightmares come back with a vengeance. Like an old, forgotten client grinning, saying, Do you really think you can escape your past? You might look and act like Robin, but you’ll never be Robin. He’s never told anyone about those dreams, not even Dick. Some things even Batman can’t know. But when Jason nearly kills himself trying to save some kids from a collapsed building, he wonders if Dick has known all along. Dickjay Week 2026 Day 6: Batman Dick

entry.title: When you try to ignore your homosexual feelings toward your younger brother
entry.summary:
Author: rainiswriting

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,779Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 24

Summary: Jason is struggling to accept that Dick is growing up, all he hears now is where he's planning to go to college and move away for an indefinite amount of time away from everyone including him, it makes Jason uneasy, his stomach churning at the thought of the little bunny being away from him. He's just..concerned that's all.

entry.title: even in arcadia you walk beside me still
entry.summary:
Author: jikkyuu

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,105Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 86

Summary: "So he woke up buried alive," Dick whispered in reply. He couldn't stop imagining what it must have felt like, to go through such terrors and end up discarded, alone, hidden six feet under. For a moment, only Alfred's breath was audible through the device. Then— "I was there," he said, slowly, "during master Jason's autopsy. He was…" "But now he's not." Dick did not want to dwell on that. There were more important things he needed to do, right away. -- Dickjay Week 2026 Day 4: Amnesiac/Catatonic Jason

entry.title: It's a blessing sir, you can't take it back!
entry.summary:
Author: Abraxax

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,896Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 117

Summary: DickJay Week 2026 (Day 5) Incubi/Succubi | Accidental/Unwanted Soul Bond | Dollification | Time Travel Fix-ItThe Goddess Arthkert has blessed him, they say. It's an incredibly rare gift, they say. A once-in-a-lifetime opportunity, they say. No, we can't take it back, they fucking say. He tries to tell them he is his brother, his estranged little brother at that, but they simply say that the Goddess does not make mistakes, and that if it's meant to be, then it's meant to be.An entire Solar System away, Jason still hasn't noticed anything strange.
